description_long: This object consists of three rectangular shelving units of varying colors and finishes, arranged in a row. Each unit features multiple open shelves, providing ample storage or display space, and lacks any visible doors or handles. The two outer units are finished in different wood tones, one darker and one lighter, while the central unit is a light gray, possibly painted or laminated. The shelves are evenly spaced and the construction appears sturdy, suitable for holding books, tools, or other items. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, making it appropriate for use in garages, workshops, or public urban spaces. The open structure allows for easy access from the front and sides, and the flat tops can also serve as additional surfaces.
description: A set of three open, rectangular shelving units in wood and gray finishes, each with multiple evenly spaced shelves and no doors or handles. The design is modern and functional, ideal for storage or display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelving units aligned, highlighting the open shelves and the different finishes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and thickness of each unit, with the central unit's solid side panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back panels and the open structure of the gray unit in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profiles and the arrangement of the three units.
